series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains: 1) Notarized charge of discrimination; 2) Agency response to complaint; 3) Correspondence between ODPS/EEO Unit and enforcement agency (OCRC, EEOC, and/or DAS/EOD); and 4) other correspondence and supporting documentation collected during case investigation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current, seven years from date of final resolution. Current ecords are retained in HR/EEO office files and transferred ODPS Record Center retention
